title: Kanban Board · Diagonal Axis
summary: A Swiss / Minimal Kanban board on a warm near-white canvas with near-black ink and a single cobalt accent: a strict orthogonal grid of hairline rules and flat near-square cards set in an austere system sans, where a disciplined 45-degree diagonal marks only the active column and high-priority cards. Five team avatars, an accessible active-column and selected-card state, and demonstrated empty, loading, error, drag, done, priority, and selection states complete the specimen.
